title: Lalmanirhat Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Lalmanirhat, with a Z-Score of +4.00. This event has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Lalmanirhat is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 76%, and the wind speed is 12.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no cooling degree days, and the situation is dire.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
